criteria.name: AI-Powered Features
criteria.description: Presence and quality of AI-driven tools for tasks like object removal, background replacement, style transfer, smart enhancements, and generative AI capabilities.

criteria.name: User Interface and Ease of Use
criteria.description: Intuitiveness and accessibility of the app's interface for both beginners and professionals.

criteria.name: Editing Capabilities
criteria.description: Range and precision of editing tools, including color correction, retouching, filters, layers, and masking.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app on various platforms such as Windows, macOS, iOS, Android, and web browsers.

criteria.name: Price
criteria.description: Cost of the app, considering free versions, subscription plans, and one-time purchases.

criteria.name: Integration with Other Tools
criteria.description: Seamlessness of integration with other software and platforms, such as Adobe Creative Cloud, Lightroom, and social media.

criteria.name: Community and Support
criteria.description: Availability of community forums, tutorials, and customer support resources.

criteria.name: Speed and Efficiency
criteria.description: Efficiency of AI tools in automating repetitive tasks and accelerating the editing process.

criteria.name: Output Quality
criteria.description: The quality of the final output of the videos and photos.
